user.title: Biamp Tesira
user.description: Choose how to find your Tesira DSP on the network.

manual.title: Connect to Tesira
manual.description: Enter connection details. Enable SSH or Telnet on the Tesira device (SSH is recommended).

discovery.title: Discover Tesira
discovery.description: UDP discovery on port 12000. Select a host or enter an IP manually.

import.title: Control points (optional)
import.description: Paste CSV or JSON control points from your Tesira layout, or leave empty.

block_entity.title: Block entities (optional)
block_entity.description: Add typed entities (level, mute, logic, etc.). Known aliases: {aliases}

add_block.title: Add block entity
add_block.description: Map a Tesira instance tag to a Home Assistant entity.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect or validate TTP session.
error.discovery_failed: No devices answered UDP discovery. Enter the IP manually.

init.title: Biamp Tesira options
init.description: Polling interval, subscription interval, re-import control points, or add block entities.

add_block.title: Add block entity
add_block.description: Map a Tesira block to a Home Assistant entity.
